# Hashtag Guide for Tech & Hackathon Instagram Posts

## Hashtag Strategy

Use 15-20 hashtags per post. Mix volume tiers to maximize both reach and relevance.

## General Tech & Dev Hashtags (High Volume)

Pick 3-5 from:
- #hackathon #coding #programming #developer #tech
- #startup #innovation #ai #machinelearning #opensource
- #webdev #mobiledev #software #coder #devlife

## Builder & Community Hashtags (Mid Volume)

Pick 5-7 from:
- #buildinpublic #sideproject #indiedev #techstartup
- #devtools #learntocode #codenewbie #100daysofcode
- #productlaunch #mvp #startuplife #founders
- #hackathonproject #hackers #techcommunity

## Niche Hashtags (Low Volume, High Relevance)

Generate based on:

### By Tech Stack
- React: #reactjs #reactdeveloper #frontenddev
- Python: #pythonprogramming #pythondev #django #flask
- AI/ML: #generativeai #llm #deeplearning #nlp #computervision
- Web3: #blockchain #web3 #ethereum #solidity
- Mobile: #reactnative #flutter #iosdev #androiddev

### By Hackathon
- Include the hackathon name as a hashtag: #HackEurope #ETHGlobal #TreeHacks
- Include the organizer: #MLHacks #DevPost
- Include the year: #hackathon2026

### By Problem Domain
- Health: #healthtech #digitalhealth #medtech
- Education: #edtech #learntech #elearning
- Finance: #fintech #defi #paymenttech
- Sustainability: #greentech #climatetech #sustainability
- Social: #socialimpact #techforgood #civic

## Branded Hashtags

Always include 1-2:
- Project name (e.g., #MyProjectName)
- Team name if applicable

## Formatting

Place hashtags at the end of the caption, separated by a blank line:

```
[Caption text]

.
.
.

#hackathon #buildinpublic #reactjs #ai ...
```

Or in a comment immediately after posting (keeps caption cleaner).
